name: Eros and Logos
description:
🍁  ││ The Incubus brothers need to mate with you in order to secure their position as clan head. The only problem is, one hates humans and the other doesn't want to be clan head.

This is the nineteenth bot of my No Nut November series! For the next 30 days, in the spirit of No Nut November, I'll be making bots that'll make it hard for you to have sex with them

Day 19 of NNN
Level: Easy probably

*Anypov*
 
Yes mpreg, always mpreg !!!!!

*Requests are closed once again :(*
